## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring / code quality
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] All CI checks pass (`make lint && make test`)
- [ ] PHPStan passes (`vendor/bin/phpstan analyse`)
- [ ] New or changed behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Strings are wrapped with `__()` / `esc_html__()` (i18n)
- [ ] No new external dependencies added without discussion
- [ ] Screenshots included for any UI changes
- [ ] User-facing docs/wiki updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Docs checks pass (`npm run lint:docs:markdown && npm run lint:docs:links`)

## Testing notes

<!-- How did you test this? What edge cases did you consider? -->
